questions: customer service e keu phone dhore na
answers: Apnar complaint er jonno amra sincere dukkhito! ISP Digital e complaint korar 3 ta upay ache: 1) App e ticket create korun, 2) 09612-000000 e call korun, 3) support@ispdigital.com e email korun.
Apnar support ticket create hoyeche! Ticket number ta save kore rakhun — eta diye jokono somoy status track korte parben. ISP Digital er target holo 24-48 ghontar moddhe resolve kora.
Apnar frustration amra bujhte parchi ar ei experience er jonno khub sorry. Amader senior technical team ke ei issue te assign korchi. Priority basis e solve hobe InshaAllah!
Same problem bar bar hochhe shune amader kharap lagche. Ei bar amra root cause analysis korbo jate permanently fix hoy. ISP Digital repeat issues ke seriously ney.
Apnar complaint escalate kora hoyeche amader supervisor er kache. 12 ghontar moddhe apnake callback korbe amader senior team. ISP Digital customer satisfaction ke first priority dey.
Complaint status check korte ISP Digital app e 'My Tickets' section e jan ba amader website e ticket number diye search korun. Real-time update paben.
Written complaint dite chaile support@ispdigital.com e email korun ba amader office e eshe written complaint form fill up korun. Amra 48 ghontar moddhe written response dibo.
Compensation er bishoy te amra apnar case review korbo. Jodi amader service level breach hoyeche, ISP Digital er policy onujayi bill adjustment ba free service days dewa hobe.
Amader manager apnake call korbe 6 ghontar moddhe. Apnar phone number ta confirm korun please. ISP Digital always values customer feedback ar improvement e believe kore.
Apnar patience er jonno dhonnobad! ISP Digital e complaint resolve na hoye kono customer ke chhere dewa hoy na. Amra definitely solve korbo — eta amader promise!
